1.name: Bram

features.name: Fighting Style
features.text: Adopt a fighting style (e.g. Defense: +1 AC while wearing armor).

features.name: Second Wind
features.text: Once per short/long rest, a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

9.name: Bram

features.name: Fighting Style
features.text: Adopt a fighting style (e.g. Defense: +1 AC while wearing armor).

features.name: Second Wind
features.text: Once per short/long rest, a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Action Surge
features.text: Once per short/long rest, take one additional action on your turn.

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.text: Choose a martial archetype that shapes your approach to battle.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.text: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: Attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.text: Add half your proficiency bonus to Str, Dex, or Con checks that don't already use it.

features.name: Indomitable
features.text: Reroll a failed saving throw; once per long rest.

9.description: Benchmark fighter — the proving ground's known quantity.

1.name: Mirelle

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + cleric level spells from the cleric list each day; you know 3 cantrips at 1st level.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.text: Choose a divine domain that grants bonus spells and features.

features.name: Domain Spells
features.text: You always have these domain spells prepared, and they don't count against your number of prepared spells: 1st—bless, cure wounds; 3rd—lesser restoration, spiritual weapon; 5th—beacon of hope, revivify; 7th—death ward, guardian of faith; 9th—mass cure wounds, raise dead.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.text: You gain proficiency with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.text: Whenever a spell of 1st level or higher restores hit points to a creature, it regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

1.description: Benchmark cleric — the proving ground's known quantity.

2.name: Mirelle

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + cleric level spells from the cleric list each day; you know 3 cantrips at 1st level.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.text: Choose a divine domain that grants bonus spells and features.

features.name: Domain Spells
features.text: You always have these domain spells prepared, and they don't count against your number of prepared spells: 1st—bless, cure wounds; 3rd—lesser restoration, spiritual weapon; 5th—beacon of hope, revivify; 7th—death ward, guardian of faith; 9th—mass cure wounds, raise dead.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.text: You gain proficiency with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.text: Whenever a spell of 1st level or higher restores hit points to a creature, it regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.text: Channel divine energy for magical effects, regaining uses on a short or long rest. You gain more uses per rest as you level (1 at 2nd, 2 at 6th, 3 at 18th).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.text: As an action, present your holy symbol; each undead within 30 feet that fails a Wisdom save is turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.text: As an action, use Channel Divinity to restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level, divided among creatures within 30 feet (up to half each one's maximum).

5.name: Mirelle

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + cleric level spells from the cleric list each day; you know 3 cantrips at 1st level.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.text: Choose a divine domain that grants bonus spells and features.

features.name: Domain Spells
features.text: You always have these domain spells prepared, and they don't count against your number of prepared spells: 1st—bless, cure wounds; 3rd—lesser restoration, spiritual weapon; 5th—beacon of hope, revivify; 7th—death ward, guardian of faith; 9th—mass cure wounds, raise dead.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.text: You gain proficiency with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.text: Whenever a spell of 1st level or higher restores hit points to a creature, it regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.text: Channel divine energy for magical effects, regaining uses on a short or long rest. You gain more uses per rest as you level (1 at 2nd, 2 at 6th, 3 at 18th).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.text: As an action, present your holy symbol; each undead within 30 feet that fails a Wisdom save is turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.text: As an action, use Channel Divinity to restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level, divided among creatures within 30 feet (up to half each one's maximum).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.text: When an undead fails its save against your Turn Undead, it is instantly destroyed if its CR is at or below a threshold that rises with your level (CR 1/2 at 5th, up to CR 4 at 17th).

features.text: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to another creature, you regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

1.name: Vex

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies (or one skill and your thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.text: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon when you have advantage, or when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and you don't have disadvantage. The damage rises by 1d6 at each odd level (up to 10d6 at 19th).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.text: You know thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and can hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

1.description: Benchmark rogue — the proving ground's known quantity.

2.name: Vex

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies (or one skill and your thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.text: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon when you have advantage, or when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and you don't have disadvantage. The damage rises by 1d6 at each odd level (up to 10d6 at 19th).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.text: You know thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and can hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.text: On each of your turns, use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

2.description: Benchmark rogue — the proving ground's known quantity.

3.name: Vex

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies (or one skill and your thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.text: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon when you have advantage, or when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and you don't have disadvantage. The damage rises by 1d6 at each odd level (up to 10d6 at 19th).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.text: You know thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and can hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.text: On each of your turns, use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.text: Use your Cunning Action bonus action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or use an object.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.text: Climbing no longer costs extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier (in feet).

features.text: Use your Cunning Action bonus action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or use an object.

features.text: Climbing no longer costs extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier (in feet).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

4.description: Benchmark rogue — the proving ground's known quantity.

5.name: Vex

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies (or one skill and your thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.text: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon when you have advantage, or when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and you don't have disadvantage. The damage rises by 1d6 at each odd level (up to 10d6 at 19th).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.text: You know thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and can hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.text: On each of your turns, use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.text: Use your Cunning Action bonus action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or use an object.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.text: Climbing no longer costs extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier (in feet).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.text: When an attacker you can see hits you, use a reaction to halve the attack's damage.

features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.text: On each of your turns, use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.text: Climbing no longer costs extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier (in feet).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.text: When an attacker you can see hits you, use a reaction to halve the attack's damage.

features.name: Evasion
features.text: When you make a Dexterity save for half damage, you instead take no damage on a success and half on a failure.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.text: You have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

9.description: Benchmark rogue — the proving ground's known quantity.

1.name: Aldous

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast wizard spells using Intelligence. Prepare INT mod + wizard level spells from your spellbook each day.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.text: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totalling up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

1.description: Benchmark wizard — the proving ground's known quantity.

2.name: Aldous

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast wizard spells using Intelligence. Prepare INT mod + wizard level spells from your spellbook each day.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.text: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totalling up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Shelter of the Faithful
features.text: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at temples of your faith, and you command the respect of those who share your religion.

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.text: Choose an arcane tradition that shapes your magic.

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.text: Halve the time and gold to copy evocation spells into your spellbook.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.text: When you cast an evocation spell affecting others, you can protect allies from its effects.
